---
title: "IFNy_DEG_Analysis"
author: "Harsha Tamtam"
date: "2026-06-05"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#this chuck is to setup defaults for basic settings of the webpage, note that this chunk is R language and the chunk below is CSS language
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
pre {
  max-height: 400px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

pre[class] {
  max-height: 200px;
}
```

## Library Section
```{r Libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(scales)
library(edgeR)
library(smplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(workflowr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggrepel)
```
